positive.stdout:
% Refutation found. Thanks to Tanya!
% SZS status Theorem for pos
% SZS output start Proof for pos
2. professional_wrestling_stable(diamond_mine) [input(axiom)]
3. leads(roderick_strong,diamond_mine) [input(axiom)]
4. ! [X0,X1] : ((leads(X0,X1) & professional_wrestling_stable(X1)) => leads_prof_wrestling_stable(X0)) [input(axiom)]
5. leads_prof_wrestling_stable(roderick_strong) [input(conjecture)]
6. ~leads_prof_wrestling_stable(roderick_strong) [negated conjecture 5]
7. ~leads_prof_wrestling_stable(roderick_strong) [flattening 6]
8. ! [X0,X1] : (leads_prof_wrestling_stable(X0) | (~leads(X0,X1) | ~professional_wrestling_stable(X1))) [ennf transformation 4]
9. ! [X0,X1] : (leads_prof_wrestling_stable(X0) | ~leads(X0,X1) | ~professional_wrestling_stable(X1)) [flattening 8]
20. professional_wrestling_stable(diamond_mine) [cnf transformation 2]
21. leads(roderick_strong,diamond_mine) [cnf transformation 3]
22. ~leads(X0,X1) | leads_prof_wrestling_stable(X0) | ~professional_wrestling_stable(X1) [cnf transformation 9]
23. ~leads_prof_wrestling_stable(roderick_strong) [cnf transformation 7]
24. leads_prof_wrestling_stable(roderick_strong) | ~professional_wrestling_stable(diamond_mine) [resolution 22,21]
25. ~professional_wrestling_stable(diamond_mine) [forward subsumption resolution 24,23]
26. $false [forward subsumption resolution 25,20]
% SZS output end Proof for pos
% Termination reason: Refutation

negative.stdout:
